lines.english: I have abandoned both the Pandits, the Hindu religious scholars, and the Mullahs, the Muslim priests. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਨਹੀ ਆਪੁ ਤਹਾ ਹੋਇ ਗਾਵਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jeh nahee aap tahaa hoe gaavau |2|
lines.english: Where egotism does not exist, there I sing God's Praises. ||2||
I weave and weave, and wear what I weave.
Whatever the Pandits and Mullahs have written,

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਾਡਿ ਚਲੇ ਹਮ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਲੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: chhaadd chale ham kachhoo na leea |3|
lines.english: I reject; I do not accept any of it. ||3||
My heart is pure, and so I have seen the Lord within.
No one respects the poor man.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਖ ਜਤਨ ਕਰੈ ਓਹੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਧਰੇਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: laakh jatan karai ohu chit na dharee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He may make thousands of efforts, but no one pays any attention to him. ||1||Pause||
Searching, searching within the self, Kabeer has met the Lord. ||4||7||
When the poor man goes to the rich man,
and sits right in front of him, the rich man turns his back on him. ||1||
But when the rich man goes to the poor man,
the poor man welcomes him with respect. ||2||
The poor man and the rich man are both brothers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੇ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੪॥੮॥
lines.translit: jaa ke hiradai naam na hoee |4|8|
lines.english: who does not have the Naam, the Name of the Lord, in his heart. ||4||8||
Says Kabeer, he alone is poor,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਕਲਾ ਨ ਮੇਟੀ ਜਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: prabh kee kalaa na mettee jaaee |3|
lines.english: God's pre-ordained plan cannot be erased. ||3||
Then, this human body is obtained.
Even the gods long for this human body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਦੇਹੀ ਭਜੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so dehee bhaj har kee sev |1|
lines.english: So vibrate that human body, and think of serving the Lord. ||1||
Serving the Guru, devotional worship is practiced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨਸ ਜਨਮ ਕਾ ਏਹੀ ਲਾਹੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: maanas janam kaa ehee laahu |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This is the blessed opportunity of this human incarnation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਜਰਾ ਰੋਗੁ ਨਹੀ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag jaraa rog nahee aaeaa |
lines.english: As long as the disease of old age has not come to the body,
Vibrate, and meditate on the Lord of the Universe, and never forget Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਬਿਕਲ ਭਈ ਨਹੀ ਬਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag bikal bhee nahee baanee |
lines.english: and as long as your voice has not lost its power,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਕਾਲਿ ਗ੍ਰਸੀ ਨਹੀ ਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag kaal grasee nahee kaaeaa |
lines.english: and as long as death has not come and seized the body,
When the end comes, you will not be able to vibrate and meditate on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਨ ਭਜਸਿ ਭਜਸਿ ਕਬ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ab na bhajas bhajas kab bhaaee |
lines.english: If you do not vibrate and meditate on Him now, when will you, O Sibing of Destiny?
O mortal being, vibrate and meditate on the Lord of the World. ||2||
He alone is a servant, whom the Lord enjoins to His service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਅਬ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kareh soee ab saar |
lines.english: Whatever you have to do - now is the best time to do it.
Otherwise, you shall regret and repent afterwards, and you shall not be carried across to the other side. ||3||
He alone attains the Immaculate Divine Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੀ ਤੇਰਾ ਅਉਸਰੁ ਇਹ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eihee teraa aausar ih teree baar |
lines.english: This is your chance, and this is your time.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਖੁਲੑੇ ਕਪਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: gur mil taa ke khulae kapaatt |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, his doors are opened wide,
and he does not have to journey again on the path of reincarnation. ||4||
Says Kabeer, you can win or lose.
Look deep into your own heart, and reflect on this.
In so many ways, I have proclaimed this out loud. ||5||1||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਤੁਮੑ ਮਿਲਿ ਕੈ ਕਰਹੁ ਬਿਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: teh tuma mil kai karahu bichaar |
lines.english: There, you shall meet with the Lord, and reflect on Him.
Thus, you shall understand this world and the next.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਵ ਕੀ ਪੁਰੀ ਬਸੈ ਬੁਧਿ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: siv kee puree basai budh saar |
lines.english: In the City of God, sublime understanding prevails.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਨੁ ਕਰਮ ਮੇਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਮਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaun karam meraa kar kar marai |1|
lines.english: What is the use of claiming that you own everything, if you only die in the end? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੋਰਾ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raajaa raam naam moraa braham giaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Name of the Sovereign Lord is my spiritual wisdom. ||1||Pause||
I focus my meditation on my inner self, deep within.
The sun blazes forth at the western gate.
I have firmly placed the moon above the sun.
In the first chakra, the root chakra, I have grasped the reins and tied them.
Through the central channel of the Shushmanaa, it rises up above my head. ||2||
There is a stone at that western gate,
and above that stone, is another window.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮੁਲਾਂ ਜੋ ਮਨ ਸਿਉ ਲਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: so mulaan jo man siau larai |
lines.english: He alone is a Mullah, who struggles with his mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰੁ ॥੩॥੨॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer taa kaa ant na paar |3|2|10|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, it has no end or limitation. ||3||2||10||
Above that window is the Tenth Gate.
Unto that Mullah, I ever offer greetings of respect. ||1||
He crushes the pride of the Messenger of Death.
and through the Guru's Teachings, fights with death.
